notes: Jacquard-EM-derived kinship coefficient θ per pair. Source column 'theta' in ngsRelate .res output. Untouched by the fork patch.
KING-robust kinship per pair. Source column 'KING' in .res output. Drives the per-pair prior class assignment used by the adaptive scheduler.
Jacquard 9-coefficient vector (J1–J9) per pair. Load-bearing path for ngsPedigree; untouched by the fork patch.
IBS0/IBS1/IBS2 site counts per pair. IBS0 ≤ 0.008 splits parent_offspring vs full_sibling inside the KING first-degree band.
Per-sample inbreeding coefficient F via ngsRelate -F. Single-individual mode, not pair-based.

CHAIN: KING-class prior derivation from a genome-wide .res anchor → per-pair budgeting by class → per-pair binary calls (ngsRelate-fast -a/-b -D 0) → escalation pass for boundary / interesting-disagreement pairs → canonical-ordered per-chrom .res. Manuscript path for catfish inversion analysis.

Six-gate validator (SPEC §6) diffing an adaptive per-chrom .res against a uniform-stride baseline. Tier-1: Gate 4 (PO dyad set equality, FS Jaccard ≥0.99, |Δθ| ≤ 0.05) and Gate 6 (≥95% interesting-recall + zero loss of parent_offspring → unrelated transitions).
